mapper.sql: t.id, t.shadow_delete_id, t.origin_order_no, t.delete_approval_id, t.delete_reason, t.before_main_status, t.compliance_delete_flag, t.delete_user_id, t.delete_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_shadow_delete t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_shadow_delete t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.origin_order_no = #{params.originOrderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_shadow_delete ( shadow_delete_id, origin_order_no, delete_approval_id, delete_reason, before_main_status, compliance_delete_flag, delete_user_id, delete_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{shadowDeleteId}, #{originOrderNo}, #{deleteApprovalId}, #{deleteReason}, #{beforeMainStatus}, #{complianceDeleteFlag}, #{deleteUserId}, #{deleteTime}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_shadow_delete ( shadow_delete_id, origin_order_no, delete_approval_id, delete_reason, before_main_status, compliance_delete_flag, delete_user_id, delete_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.shadowDeleteId}, #{item.originOrderNo}, #{item.deleteApprovalId}, #{item.deleteReason}, #{item.beforeMainStatus}, #{item.complianceDeleteFlag}, #{item.deleteUserId}, #{item.deleteTime}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_shadow_delete t SET
t.delete_reason = #{deleteReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_shadow_delete t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
